summary: PDF Report Generation feature tested and bug fixed. Found and fixed critical bug: 'doc.autoTable is not a function' error due to jspdf-autotable 5.x import change. Applied fix by using applyPlugin(jsPDF) to register the autoTable method. All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend flow verified: Login -> Load Dataset -> Train Model -> PDF Report button visible and clickable without JS errors. Deploy and What-If tabs verified working.

bugs_fixed.issue: PDF generation failed: doc.autoTable is not a function
bugs_fixed.root_cause: jspdf-autotable 5.x with jspdf 4.x requires explicit plugin registration. The old import style 'import jspdf-autotable' no longer automatically attaches doc.autoTable() method.
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Updated /app/frontend/src/utils/reportGenerator.js to import { applyPlugin } from 'jspdf-autotable' and call applyPlugin(jsPDF) before creating PDF documents.

critical_code_review_comments: PDF Report generation now works correctly with jspdf 4.2.1 and jspdf-autotable 5.0.8
The generateReport function properly handles all report sections: cover page, executive summary, dataset overview, model leaderboard, feature importance, LIME results, deployments, and conclusions
handleExportPDF in App.js correctly fetches deployments before generating report
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (export-pdf-btn, nav-deploy, nav-whatif, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All PDF Report and regression tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Report generation feature is now working. Key fix: jspdf-autotable 5.x requires applyPlugin(jsPDF) call to enable doc.autoTable() method. The PDF button appears in toolbar when (trainingResult || shapGlobal || limeResult || predictionHistory?.length > 0) && !viewOnlyMode. Report includes: cover page with violet gradient, table of contents, executive summary, dataset overview with metric cards, analysis configuration, model leaderboard with bar chart, best model performance, feature importance, LIME results, prediction history, global leaderboard, deployments table, and conclusions. Deploy and What-If features continue to work correctly (verified in iteration_36).

rca_of_the_issue.bug: TypeError: doc.autoTable is not a function
reproduction_steps: 2. Load a sample dataset (e.g., Loan Approval)
3. Select target column and train a model
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: jspdf-autotable version 5.x changed its API. The old import style 'import jspdf-autotable' (side-effect import) no longer automatically attaches the autoTable method to jsPDF document instances. The library now requires explicit plugin registration via applyPlugin(jsPDF).
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Changed import from 'import jspdf-autotable' to 'import { applyPlugin } from jspdf-autotable' and added 'applyPlugin(jsPDF)' call before using doc.autoTable()
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested PDF Report button click - no JS errors in console, PDF generation triggered successfully
